title: Standards and Testing Agency: annual report and accounts 2023 to 2024
body: "STA’s annual report and accounts 2023 to 2024 covers the financial year ended 31 March 2024.  STA, an executive agency of the Department for Education, develops and delivers assessments for children in education between reception and the end of key stage 2.  This report was laid before Parliament on 29 July 2024. "
